text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
When I noticed your light on, I didn't<n>want to
believe you'd still be awake,<n>yet here we are.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You're looking awfully pale. Have<n>you been
getting enough rest?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Riko Kashimoto—an executive member<n>of the URA
currently employed by<n>Tracen Academy—is
suddenly<n>standing beside me.
choice_data_list: I've been a little busy lately...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
What would the students think if you,<n>a trainer,
were to collapse from<n>exhaustion? You should be
more<n>mindful of your position.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her warning is harsh, but I can't help<n>noticing
she must have also just<n>finished a rough day of
work.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Well... I suppose I'm in no position to<n>scold
others for working late today.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We head out of the office while<n>sharing some
notes and information<n>with each other.
